_comment: Ashland Grove – Zone 2 (Levels 12–17). Burned druidic forest scarred by elemental surges and corrupted treants.
biome: burned forest, ember groves, ash plains, druidic ruins

emberfall_showers.notes: Triggered randomly; intensity increases near elemental rifts.

smoldering_ground.notes: Appears in burned clearings and near treant battle sites.

volatile_root_flares.notes: Corrupted treant roots erupt from the ground.

ash_choke_clouds.notes: Caused by wind sweeping through burned groves.

wildfire_surge_events.notes: Short-duration wildfire waves that force repositioning.

signature_features.emberheart_clearing: Central burned grove where fire elementals manifest.
signature_features.ashen_spiral: Druidic ritual circle half-buried in ash and cracked stone.
signature_features.charred_treeline: Forest edge where corrupted treants patrol.
signature_features.grove_of_last_bloom: One surviving druidic sanctuary protected by ancient wards.
signature_features.rifted_hollow: Fire rift crater spawning volatile elementals.

groveward_druids.description: Surviving druids attempting to contain the elemental surges.
groveward_druids.notes: Offer cleansing rituals and nature-based quests.

corrupted_treants.description: Once-protectors of the grove, now twisted by void ash.
corrupted_treants.notes: High health, slow movement, devastating root attacks.

fire_elementals.description: Manifestations of wildfire energy leaking from rifts.
fire_elementals.notes: Explode on death; resistant to fire.

moribund_order.description: Cultists attempting to bind elemental spirits for void rituals.
moribund_order.notes: Operate near Ashen Spiral and Rifted Hollow.

story_seeds: Groveward Druids report a corrupted treant colossus roaming the Charred Treeline.
Fire rifts in Rifted Hollow are growing unstable, threatening a wildfire surge.
A Moribund pyromancer seeks to bind an elemental spirit beneath Ashen Spiral.
The Grove of Last Bloom is losing its protective wards.
A druidshade apparition warns of a coming elemental catastrophe.
